attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
CPI.BK_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJ_ID_INT
,CPI.WPR_LEAD_ORGANIZATION_NAME
,CPI.WILDCARD_1_CMT
,CPI.WILDCARD_2_CMT
,CPI.WILDCARD_3_CMT
,CPI.WILDCARD_4_CMT
,CPI.TOTAL_BUDGET_USD_AMT
,CPI.TOTAL_CAPITAL_USD_AMT
,CPI.TOTAL_EXPENSE_USD_AMT
,CPI.TOTAL_PROJECT_USD_AMT
,CPI.TOTAL_SPENT_USD_AMT
,CPI.TOTAL_UNAPPROVED_USD_AMT
,CPI.TOTAL_APPROVED_USD_AMT
,CPI.RESERVED_PROPERTY_FLG
,CPI.REQUESTED_CAPITAL_USD_AMT
,CPI.PROJECT_TYPE_CD
,CPI.PROJECT_REASON_TYPE_CD
,CPI.PROJECT_COST_RANGE_DESCR
,CPI.PROJECT_MANAGER_NAME
,CPI.PROJECT_ACTIVE_STATUS_CD
,CPI.PROJECT_STATUS_CD
,CPI.PROJECT_DURATION_MONTH_CNT
,CPI.PROJECT_DESCR
,CPI.PRIORITY_LEVEL_INT
,CPI.MANUFACTURING_PLANT_CD
,CPI.PERCENT_WORK_COMPLETED_CD
,CPI.OTHER_CONTACT_NAME
,CPI.ORIGINAL_PROJECT_USD_AMT
,CPI.FINANCE_REGION_CD
,CPI.FACILITY_TYPE_CD
,CPI.ELCTRNC_PRJ_APPRVL_FRM_USD_AMT
,CPI.ELCTRNC_PRJ_APPRVL_FRM_NUM
,CPI.DIRECTOR_NAME
,CPI.COST_TYPE_DESCR
,CPI.CONTROLLER_REVIEWER_NAME
,CPI.CONTROLLER_REVIEW_DT
,CPI.CLIENT_REVIEWER_NAME
,CPI.CLIENT_REVIEW_DT
,CPI.CIP_PROJECT_ID
,CPI.CIP_PROJECT_FLG
,CPI.CERTAINTY_LEVEL_INT
,CPI.BDLG_OWNERSHP_STATUS_DESCR
,CPI.ALLOC_SPACE_UNIT_MEASURE_CD
,CPI.PROJECT_SIZE_AREA_AMT
,CPI.PROJ_SIZE_AREA_UNIT_MEASURE_CD
,CPI.ALLOCATED_SPACE_QTY
,CPI.CPTL_FUTURE_PRJ_CREATION_DTM
,CPI.FUTURE_PROJECT_LAST_UPDATE_DTM
,CPI.CPTL_FUTURE_PRJ_APPRVL_DT
,CPI.CPTL_FUTURE_PRJ_APPRVL_FLG
,CPI.CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJECT_CD
,CPI.CPTL_FUTURE_PRJ_BIZ_JSTF_DESCR
,CPI.CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJECT_NAME
,CPI.PROJECT_AREA_TYPE_NAME
,CPI.SPACE_TYPE_CD
,CPI.PRJ_PRIORITY_WEIGHTING_FCTR_RT
,CPI.PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT
,CPI.PROJECT_CD
,CPI.CRTD_CISCO_WRKR_PARTY_KEY
,CPI.LAST_UPD_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY
,CPI.BUILDING_ID
,CPI.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID
,CPI.CAM_PLNNR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY
,CPI.ISO_COUNTRY_CD
,CPI.DCM_PRJ_MGR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY
,CPI.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD
,CPI.EST_END_MTH_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT
,CPI.EST_END_MTH_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT
,CPI.EST_END_QTR_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT
,CPI.EST_END_QTR_FSCL_QTR_NUM_INT
,CPI.EST_START_QTR_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT
,CPI.EST_START_QTR_FSCL_QTR_NUM_INT
,CPI.EST_START_MTH_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT
,CPI.EST_START_MTH_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT
,CPI.FCLTY_MGR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY
,CPI.FRST_CUST_SHP_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT
,CPI.FRST_CUST_SHP_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT
,CPI.FIN_ANLYST_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY
,CPI.GLBL_CAM_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY
,CPI.EST_CMPLTN_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT
,CPI.EST_CMPLTN_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT
,CPI.PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID
,CPI.TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID
,CPI.RL_EST_MGR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY
,CPI.REQUESTOR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY
,CPI.WPR_COST_DEPARTMENT_CD
,CPI.WPR_COST_COMPANY_CD
,CPI.START_TV_DT
,CPI.END_TV_DT
,CPI.PROJECT_PARENT  PARENT_PROJECT_DESCRIPTION 
,CPI.REGION  WPR_REGION_CODE
,CPI.CRITICALITY_LEVEL  CRITICALITY_LEVEL_INT  
,CPI.CIP_CAP_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT  
,CPI.CIP_CAP_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT   
,CPI.BK_CPTL_FUTURE_ORG_ABBR_NAME  CAP_FUT_ORG_ABB_NAME 
,CPI.PROJECT_LOCATION_STATE_CD     
,CPI.PROJECT_LOCATION_CITY_NAME    
,CPI.ACTION_CODE 
,'I' AS DML_TYPE
,'N' as SOURCE_DELETED_FLG
from
(
select 
			SCPI.CAPIT_PROJECT_ID as BK_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJ_ID_INT ,
			SCPI.PROJECT_NAME  as  CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJECT_NAME ,
			COALESCE(SCPI.PROJECT_ACTIVE_STATUS,'UNKNOWN') as   CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJECT_CD , 
			SCPI.BUSINESS_JUSTIFICATION  as CPTL_FUTURE_PRJ_BIZ_JSTF_DESCR  ,
			-999  as  PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT ,
			NFP.BK_PROJECT_CODE  as  PROJECT_CD ,
			COALESCE(SCPI.APPROVAL_FLAG,'=')  as  CPTL_FUTURE_PRJ_APPRVL_FLG ,
			cast(SCPI.APPROVAL_DATE as DATE)  as  CPTL_FUTURE_PRJ_APPRVL_DT,
			SCPI.CREATION_DATE as CPTL_FUTURE_PRJ_CREATION_DTM ,
			SCPI.LAST_UPDATE_DATE  as  FUTURE_PROJECT_LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
			COALESCE(CCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) as  CRTD_CISCO_WRKR_PARTY_KEY  ,
			COALESCE(LUCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) as LAST_UPD_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY  ,
			COALESCE(SCPI.ALLOCATED_SPACE,0)  as ALLOCATED_SPACE_QTY ,
			COALESCE(SCPI.ALLOCATED_SPACE_UOM,'UNK') as ALLOC_SPACE_UNIT_MEASURE_CD,
			COALESCE(SCPI.AREA ,0) as PROJECT_SIZE_AREA_AMT , 
			COALESCE(SCPI.AREA_UOM,'UNK')  as PROJ_SIZE_AREA_UNIT_MEASURE_CD,
			SCPI.BLDG_OWNERSHIP_STATUS  as BDLG_OWNERSHP_STATUS_DESCR ,
			NWRL.BK_BUILDING_ID as BUILDING_ID,
			COALESCE(NBU.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,'UNKNOWN') as BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,
			COALESCE(CPCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) as CAM_PLNNR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY  ,
			SCPI.CERTAINTY_LEVEL as CERTAINTY_LEVEL_INT,
			COALESCE(SCPI.CIP_PROJECT_FLAG,'=') as CIP_PROJECT_FLG,
			SCPI.CIP_PROJECT_ID as CIP_PROJECT_ID,
			cast( SCPI.CLIENT_REVIEW_DATE as DATE)  as CLIENT_REVIEW_DT ,
			SCPI.CLIENT_REVIEWER as CLIENT_REVIEWER_NAME ,
			cast(SCPI.CONTROLLER_REVIEW_DATE as DATE) as CONTROLLER_REVIEW_DT,
			SCPI.CONTROLLER_REVIEWER as CONTROLLER_REVIEWER_NAME,
			SCPI.COST_TYPE as COST_TYPE_DESCR ,
			COALESCE(NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK')   as ISO_COUNTRY_CD , 
			COALESCE(DPMCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) as DCM_PRJ_MGR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY ,
			SCPI.DIRECTOR as DIRECTOR_NAME ,
			COALESCE( SCPI.DV_EPAF_AMOUNT,0)   as ELCTRNC_PRJ_APPRVL_FRM_USD_AMT ,
			SCPI.EPAF_NUMBER as ELCTRNC_PRJ_APPRVL_FRM_NUM,
			'Fisacl Year' as BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD  ,
			COALESCE(EEMNFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,1900) as EST_END_MTH_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT,
			COALESCE(EEMNFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,99) as EST_END_MTH_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT  ,
			COALESCE(EEQNFQ.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,1900)  as EST_END_QTR_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT ,
			COALESCE(EEQNFQ.BK_FISCAL_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT ,9) as EST_END_QTR_FSCL_QTR_NUM_INT ,
			COALESCE(ESQNFQ.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,1900) as  EST_START_QTR_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT ,
			COALESCE(ESQNFQ.BK_FISCAL_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT ,9) as EST_START_QTR_FSCL_QTR_NUM_INT  , 
			COALESCE(ESMNFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,1900 ) as EST_START_MTH_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT,
			COALESCE(ESMNFM .BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,99) as EST_START_MTH_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT ,
			COALESCE(FMCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY ,-999) as FCLTY_MGR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY  ,
			SCPI.FACILITY_TYPE as FACILITY_TYPE_CD ,
			COALESCE(FCSNFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,1900) as FRST_CUST_SHP_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT ,
			COALESCE(FCSNFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT ,99) as FRST_CUST_SHP_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT  ,
			SCPI.FINANCE_REGION as FINANCE_REGION_CD,
			COALESCE(FACWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY ,-999)  AS FIN_ANLYST_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY ,
			COALESCE(GCCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS GLBL_CAM_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
			COALESCE(SCPI.DV_ORIGINAL_PROJECT_AMOUNT,0)  AS ORIGINAL_PROJECT_USD_AMT,
			SCPI.OTHER_CONTACT AS OTHER_CONTACT_NAME,
			COALESCE(OECNFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,1900) AS EST_CMPLTN_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT  ,
			COALESCE(OECNFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,99) AS EST_CMPLTN_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT ,
			SCPI.PERCENT_WORK_COMPLETED AS PERCENT_WORK_COMPLETED_CD,
			SCPI.PLANT AS MANUFACTURING_PLANT_CD,
			SCPI.PRIORITY_LEVEL AS PRIORITY_LEVEL_INT,
			SCPI.DV_PRODUCT_FAMILY AS PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
			SCPI.DV_TECH_GROUP AS TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID,
			COALESCE(SCPI.PROJECT_AREA_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS  PROJECT_AREA_TYPE_NAME, 
			SCPI.PROJECT_DESCRIPTION AS PROJECT_DESCR ,
			SCPI.PROJECT_DURATION AS PROJECT_DURATION_MONTH_CNT ,
			SCPI.PROJECT_LIST_STATUS AS PROJECT_ACTIVE_STATUS_CD, 
			SCPI.PROJECT_MANAGER AS PROJECT_MANAGER_NAME,
			SCPI.PROJECT_RANGE AS PROJECT_COST_RANGE_DESCR ,
			SCPI.PROJECT_REASON_TYPE AS PROJECT_REASON_TYPE_CD,
			SCPI.PROJECT_STATUS AS PROJECT_STATUS_CD,
			SCPI.PROJECT_TYPE AS PROJECT_TYPE_CD,
			COALESCE(RLMNCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999)AS RL_EST_MGR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
			COALESCE(SCPI.DV_REQUESTED_CAPITAL,0)   AS REQUESTED_CAPITAL_USD_AMT,
			COALESCE(REQNCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY ,-999) AS REQUESTOR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
			COALESCE(SCPI.RESERVED_PROPERTY,'=') AS RESERVED_PROPERTY_FLG,
			COALESCE(SCPI.DV_TOTAL_APPROVED_AMOUNT,0)  AS TOTAL_APPROVED_USD_AMT,
			COALESCE( SCPI.DV_TOTAL_BUDGET_AMOUNT,0)  AS TOTAL_BUDGET_USD_AMT,
			COALESCE( SCPI.DV_TOTAL_CAPITAL_AMOUNT,0)  AS TOTAL_CAPITAL_USD_AMT,
			COALESCE(SCPI.DV_TOTAL_EXPENSE_AMOUNT,0)  AS TOTAL_EXPENSE_USD_AMT ,
			COALESCE(SCPI.DV_TOTAL_PROJECT_AMOUNT ,0) AS TOTAL_PROJECT_USD_AMT,
			COALESCE(SCPI.DV_TOTAL_SPENT_AMOUNT,0)  AS TOTAL_SPENT_USD_AMT ,
			COALESCE(SCPI.DV_TOTAL_UNAPPROVED_AMOUNT,0) AS TOTAL_UNAPPROVED_USD_AMT,
			SCPI.WILDCARD1 AS WILDCARD_1_CMT,
			SCPI.WILDCARD2 AS WILDCARD_2_CMT,
			SCPI.WILDCARD3 AS WILDCARD_3_CMT,
			SCPI.WILDCARD4 AS WILDCARD_4_CMT,
			NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE AS WPR_COST_DEPARTMENT_CD,
			NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE AS WPR_COST_COMPANY_CD,
			SCPI.WPR_LEAD_ORG AS WPR_LEAD_ORGANIZATION_NAME ,
			SCPI.CRITICALITY_LEVEL as PRJ_PRIORITY_WEIGHTING_FCTR_RT,  
			SCPI.SPACE_TYPE as SPACE_TYPE_CD,
		    '3500-01-01'   as START_TV_DT ,
            '3500-01-01'   as END_TV_DT,
            SCPI.ACTION_CODE,
			SCPI.CRITICALITY_LEVEL, 
			SCPI.PROJECT_PARENT , 
			SCPI.REGION, 
			COALESCE(CCNFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,1900) as CIP_CAP_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT, 
			COALESCE(CCNFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,99) as CIP_CAP_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT  , 
			NCFO.BK_CPTL_FUTURE_ORG_ABBR_NAME,
			SCPI.CITY as PROJECT_LOCATION_CITY_NAME,
			SCPI.STATE_PROVINCE as PROJECT_LOCATION_STATE_CD 		
			from					  
			(
				select 
					CAPIT_PROJECT_ID ,
					PROJECT_NAME,
					BUSINESS_JUSTIFICATION,
					COALESCE(SI_PROJECT_ID,'UNKNOW') as DV_SI_PROJECT_ID,
					APPROVAL_FLAG,
					APPROVAL_DATE ,
					CREATION_DATE,
					LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
					CREATED_BY,
					LAST_UPDATED_BY,
					ALLOCATED_SPACE,
					ALLOCATED_SPACE_UOM,
					AREA,
					AREA_UOM,
					BLDG_OWNERSHIP_STATUS,
					COALESCE(BUILDING_ID,'UNKNOWN') as DV_BUILDING_ID,
					COALESCE(BUSINESS_UNIT,'UNKNOWN' ) as DV_BUSINESS_UNIT,
					CAM_PLANNER,
					CERTAINTY_LEVEL,
					CIP_PROJECT_FLAG,
					CIP_PROJECT_ID,
					CLIENT_REVIEW_DATE,
					CLIENT_REVIEWER,
					CONTROLLER_REVIEW_DATE,
					CONTROLLER_REVIEWER,
					COST_TYPE,
					CASE WHEN trim(COUNTRY)='Dubai' THEN 'United Arab Emirates' 
						 WHEN trim(COUNTRY) = 'EMEA' THEN 'United Kingdom'
						 WHEN trim(COUNTRY) = 'England' THEN 'United Kingdom' 
						 WHEN trim(COUNTRY) = 'Globally' THEN 'UNKNOWN'
						 WHEN trim(COUNTRY) = 'Kazakhhstan' THEN 'Kazakhstan'
						 WHEN trim(COUNTRY) = 'Korea' THEN 'South Korea'
						 WHEN trim(COUNTRY) = 'PHILIPPINES' THEN 'Phillipines'
						 WHEN trim(COUNTRY) = 'RUSSIA' THEN 'Russian Federation'
						 WHEN trim(COUNTRY) = 'Scotland' THEN 'United Kingdom'
						 WHEN  trim( COUNTRY) = 'SERBIA' THEN 'Serbia and Montenegro'
						 WHEN  trim(COUNTRY) ='TRINIDAD & TOBAGO' THEN 'Trinidad and Tobago'
						 WHEN  trim(COUNTRY) = 'UNITED STATES' OR  trim(COUNTRY) ='US' OR  trim(COUNTRY)='USA' 
						            THEN 'United States of America'
						 WHEN  trim(COUNTRY) = 'Uraguay' THEN 'Uruguay'
						 WHEN  trim(COUNTRY) = '' THEN 'UNKNOWN' 
						 when   COUNTRY  IS NULL  then 'UNKNOWN'  END  as DV_COUNTRY,
					DCM_PROJECT_MANAGER,
					DIRECTOR,
					EPAF_AMOUNT * 1000 as DV_EPAF_AMOUNT,
					EPAF_NUMBER,
					ESTIMATED_END_MONTH,
					ESTIMATED_END_QUARTER,
					ESTIMATED_START_QUARTER,
					ESTIMATED_START_MONTH,
					FACILITY_MANAGER,
					FACILITY_TYPE,
					FIRST_CUSTOMER_SHIP_DATE,
					FINANCE_REGION,
					FINANCIAL_ANALYST,
					GLOBAL_CAM,
					ORIGINAL_PROJECT_AMOUNT * 1000 as DV_ORIGINAL_PROJECT_AMOUNT,
					OTHER_CONTACT,
					OTHER_EST_COMP_DATE,
					PERCENT_WORK_COMPLETED,
					PLANT,
					PRIORITY_LEVEL,
					COALESCE(PRODUCT_FAMILY,'UNKNOWN') as DV_PRODUCT_FAMILY,
					TECH_GROUP,
					PROJECT_DESCRIPTION,
					CASE WHEN PROJECT_DURATION = 'NA' THEN -999  ELSE PROJECT_DURATION END 
					PROJECT_DURATION,
					PROJECT_ACTIVE_STATUS,
					PROJECT_MANAGER,
					PROJECT_RANGE,
					PROJECT_REASON_TYPE,
					PROJECT_STATUS,
					PROJECT_TYPE,
					PROJECT_AREA_TYPE,
					REALESTATE_MANAGER,
					cast (REQUESTED_CAPITAL* cast(1000 as DECIMAL(26,7) )   as decimal(26,7) ) as  DV_REQUESTED_CAPITAL ,
					case when REQUESTOR=' ' then 'UNKNOWN'  end DV_REQUESTOR ,
					RESERVED_PROPERTY,
					cast(TOTAL_APPROVED_AMOUNT * 1000  as decimal(26,7) ) as DV_TOTAL_APPROVED_AMOUNT  ,
					TOTAL_BUDGET_AMOUNT * 1000 as DV_TOTAL_BUDGET_AMOUNT  ,
					TOTAL_CAPITAL_AMOUNT * 1000  as DV_TOTAL_CAPITAL_AMOUNT,
					TOTAL_EXPENSE_AMOUNT  * 1000 as DV_TOTAL_EXPENSE_AMOUNT  ,
					TOTAL_PROJECT_AMOUNT  * 1000  as DV_TOTAL_PROJECT_AMOUNT ,
					TOTAL_SPENT_AMOUNT * 1000  as  DV_TOTAL_SPENT_AMOUNT,
					TOTAL_UNAPPROVED_AMOUNT * 1000  as DV_TOTAL_UNAPPROVED_AMOUNT,
					WILDCARD1,
					WILDCARD2,
					WILDCARD3,
					WILDCARD4,
					case when WPR_COST_DEPARTMENT='Unknown' then NULL else WPR_COST_DEPARTMENT end  DV_WPR_COST_DEPARTMENT ,
					REGION,
					WPR_LEAD_ORG,
					SPACE_TYPE,
					PROJECT_LIST_STATUS,
					cast( substr(trim(ESTIMATED_END_MONTH),1,3) as char(3)) as DV_ESTIMATED_END_MONTH_Month,
					cast(substr(trim(ESTIMATED_END_MONTH),5) as integer ) as DV_ESTIMATED_END_MONTH_Year,
					cast( substr(trim(ESTIMATED_START_MONTH),1,3) as char(3) ) as DV_ESTIMATED_START_MONTH_Month,
					cast( substr(trim(ESTIMATED_START_MONTH),5) as integer) as DV_ESTIMATED_START_MONTH_Year,
					cast(substr(trim(FIRST_CUSTOMER_SHIP_DATE),1,3) as char(3) ) as DV_FIRST_CUSTOMER_SHIP_DATE_Mt,
					cast ( substr(trim(FIRST_CUSTOMER_SHIP_DATE),5)  as integer)  as  DV_FIRST_CUSTOMER_SHIP_DATE_Yr,
					cast( substr(trim(OTHER_EST_COMP_DATE),1,3)  as char(3) ) as DV_OTHER_EST_COMP_DATE_Month,
					cast ( substr(trim(OTHER_EST_COMP_DATE),5) as integer) as DV_OTHER_EST_COMP_DATE_Year,
					COALESCE(substr(trim(DV_WPR_COST_DEPARTMENT),1,3),'UNK') as DV_WPR_COST_DEPARTMENT_Comp,
					COALESCE(substr(trim(DV_WPR_COST_DEPARTMENT),4,6),'UNKNOW') as DV_WPR_COST_DEPARTMENT_Dept,
					COALESCE(TECH_GROUP,'UNKNOWN') as DV_TECH_GROUP,
					CRITICALITY_LEVEL,
					CREATE_DATETIME,
                    ACTION_CODE,
					PROJECT_PARENT ,    
					CIP_CAPITALIZATION_DATE,  
					cast( substr(trim(CIP_CAPITALIZATION_DATE),1,3) as char(3)) as DV_CAPIT_START_MONTH_Month, 
					cast(substr(trim(CIP_CAPITALIZATION_DATE),5) as integer ) as DV_CAPIT_START_MONTH_Year, 
				    ORG_ID  ,
				    CITY,
				    STATE_PROVINCE				
			from 
					$$STGDB.ST_CAP_PROJECT_INFO  
							) SCPI  
			INNER JOIN (select BK_PROJECT_CODE from  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_PROJECT_TV group by BK_PROJECT_CODE) NFP
				on SCPI.DV_SI_PROJECT_ID = NFP.BK_PROJECT_CODE 
						INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CAPITAL_FUTURE_ORG  NCFO  
				ON SCPI.ORG_ID = NCFO.SK_ORG_ID
            LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY CCWP
				ON SCPI.created_by = CCWP.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS
			LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY LUCWP
				ON SCPI.LAST_UPDATED_BY = LUCWP.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS 
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_WORKPLACE_RESOURCE_LOCATION  NWRL
				on SCPI.DV_BUILDING_ID=NWRL.BK_BUILDING_ID 
			/* INNER  JOIN   (select  BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID from $$COMREFVWDB.N_BUSINESS_UNIT_TV group by 1 )NBU
				on SCPI.DV_BUSINESS_UNIT = NBU.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID   */  /* CHANGING TO LEFT OUTER JOIN AS PER REQUIREMENT */
			LEFT OUTER  JOIN   (select  BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID from $$COMREFVWDB.N_BUSINESS_UNIT_TV group by 1 )NBU
				on SCPI.DV_BUSINESS_UNIT = NBU.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID  
			LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY CPCWP
				ON  SCPI.CAM_PLANNER= CPCWP.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS
			LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC
				ON trim(SCPI.DV_COUNTRY)= trim(NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME)	 
			LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY  DPMCWP
				ON SCPI. DCM_PROJECT_MANAGER=DPMCWP.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS 
			LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH  EEMNFM
				ON 	DV_ESTIMATED_END_MONTH_Month  =  substr(EEMNFM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,1,3) 
			    and DV_ESTIMATED_END_MONTH_Year  =  cast( substr(EEMNFM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME, CHARACTER_LENGTH(EEMNFM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME)-1,2) as integer) 
			LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_QUARTER EEQNFQ
				ON SCPI. ESTIMATED_END_QUARTER=EEQNFQ. DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
			LEFT OUTER   JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_QUARTER ESQNFQ
				ON SCPI. ESTIMATED_START_QUARTER=ESQNFQ. DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
			LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH ESMNFM
				ON DV_ESTIMATED_START_MONTH_Month  = substr(ESMNFM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,1,3) 
					and DV_ESTIMATED_START_MONTH_Year  =  cast( substr(ESMNFM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME, CHARACTER_LENGTH(ESMNFM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME)-1,2)  as integer)
			LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH CCNFM  
				ON DV_CAPIT_START_MONTH_Month  = substr(CCNFM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,1,3) 
					and DV_CAPIT_START_MONTH_Year  =  cast( substr(CCNFM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME, CHARACTER_LENGTH (CCNFM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME)-1,2)  as integer) 
            LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY FMCWP
				ON  SCPI.FACILITY_MANAGER= FMCWP.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS
			LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH FCSNFM
				ON  DV_FIRST_CUSTOMER_SHIP_DATE_Mt  =  substr(FCSNFM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,1,3)  
					and DV_FIRST_CUSTOMER_SHIP_DATE_Yr  =  cast( substr(FCSNFM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME, CHARACTER_LENGTH(FCSNFM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME)-1,2)  as integer)
			LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH OECNFM
				ON cast( substr(OECNFM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,1,3) as CHAR(3) )  = DV_OTHER_EST_COMP_DATE_Month
				AND cast( substr(OECNFM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME, CHARACTER_LENGTH(OECNFM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME)-1,2) as integer)  = DV_OTHER_EST_COMP_DATE_Year
			/*INNER JOIN (SELECT BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID from   $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_FAMILY_TV GROUP BY 1)  NPF
				ON NPF.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID = SCPI.DV_PRODUCT_FAMILY  */
			INNER  JOIN (SELECT BK_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID from  $$COMREFVWDB.N_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_TV group by 1)  NTG 
				ON NTG.BK_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID = DV_TECH_GROUP  
			LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY RLMNCWP
				ON trim(SCPI.REALESTATE_MANAGER) = RLMNCWP.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS
			LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY REQNCWP
				ON SCPI.DV_REQUESTOR = REQNCWP.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS 
			LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY FACWP
				ON SCPI.FINANCIAL_ANALYST = FACWP.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS
			LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY GCCWP
				ON SCPI.GLOBAL_CAM = GCCWP.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS
			INNER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT NFD
				ON DV_WPR_COST_DEPARTMENT_Comp = NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE
				AND DV_WPR_COST_DEPARTMENT_Dept = NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE 
                        WHERE SCPI.DV_PRODUCT_FAMILY IN (SELECT BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID from   $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_FAMILY_TV GROUP BY 1)
				) CPI

SELECT
	TVOUTPUT.BK_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJ_ID_INT
	,TVOUTPUT.WPR_LEAD_ORGANIZATION_NAME
	,TVOUTPUT.WILDCARD_1_CMT
	,TVOUTPUT.WILDCARD_2_CMT
	,TVOUTPUT.WILDCARD_3_CMT
	,TVOUTPUT.WILDCARD_4_CMT
	,TVOUTPUT.TOTAL_BUDGET_USD_AMT
	,TVOUTPUT.TOTAL_CAPITAL_USD_AMT
	,TVOUTPUT.TOTAL_EXPENSE_USD_AMT
	,TVOUTPUT.TOTAL_PROJECT_USD_AMT
	,TVOUTPUT.TOTAL_SPENT_USD_AMT
	,TVOUTPUT.TOTAL_UNAPPROVED_USD_AMT
	,TVOUTPUT.TOTAL_APPROVED_USD_AMT
	,TVOUTPUT.RESERVED_PROPERTY_FLG
	,TVOUTPUT.REQUESTED_CAPITAL_USD_AMT
	,TVOUTPUT.PROJECT_TYPE_CD
	,TVOUTPUT.PROJECT_REASON_TYPE_CD
	,TVOUTPUT.PROJECT_COST_RANGE_DESCR
	,TVOUTPUT.PROJECT_MANAGER_NAME
	,TVOUTPUT.PROJECT_ACTIVE_STATUS_CD
	,TVOUTPUT.PROJECT_STATUS_CD
	,TVOUTPUT.PROJECT_DURATION_MONTH_CNT
	,TVOUTPUT.PROJECT_DESCR
	,TVOUTPUT.PRIORITY_LEVEL_INT
	,TVOUTPUT.MANUFACTURING_PLANT_CD
	,TVOUTPUT.PERCENT_WORK_COMPLETED_CD
	,TVOUTPUT.OTHER_CONTACT_NAME
	,TVOUTPUT.ORIGINAL_PROJECT_USD_AMT
	,TVOUTPUT.FINANCE_REGION_CD
	,TVOUTPUT.FACILITY_TYPE_CD
	,TVOUTPUT.ELCTRNC_PRJ_APPRVL_FRM_USD_AMT
	,TVOUTPUT.ELCTRNC_PRJ_APPRVL_FRM_NUM
	,TVOUTPUT.DIRECTOR_NAME
	,TVOUTPUT.COST_TYPE_DESCR
	,TVOUTPUT.CONTROLLER_REVIEWER_NAME
	,TVOUTPUT.CONTROLLER_REVIEW_DT
	,TVOUTPUT.CLIENT_REVIEWER_NAME
	,TVOUTPUT.CLIENT_REVIEW_DT
	,TVOUTPUT.CIP_PROJECT_ID
	,TVOUTPUT.CIP_PROJECT_FLG
	,TVOUTPUT.CERTAINTY_LEVEL_INT
	,TVOUTPUT.BDLG_OWNERSHP_STATUS_DESCR
	,TVOUTPUT.ALLOC_SPACE_UNIT_MEASURE_CD
	,TVOUTPUT.PROJECT_SIZE_AREA_AMT
	,TVOUTPUT.PROJ_SIZE_AREA_UNIT_MEASURE_CD
	,TVOUTPUT.ALLOCATED_SPACE_QTY
	,TVOUTPUT.CPTL_FUTURE_PRJ_CREATION_DTM
	,TVOUTPUT.FUTURE_PROJECT_LAST_UPDATE_DTM
	,TVOUTPUT.CPTL_FUTURE_PRJ_APPRVL_DT
	,TVOUTPUT.CPTL_FUTURE_PRJ_APPRVL_FLG
	,TVOUTPUT.CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJECT_CD
	,TVOUTPUT.CPTL_FUTURE_PRJ_BIZ_JSTF_DESCR
	,TVOUTPUT.CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJECT_NAME
	,TVOUTPUT.PROJECT_AREA_TYPE_NAME
	,TVOUTPUT.SPACE_TYPE_CD
	,TVOUTPUT.PRJ_PRIORITY_WEIGHTING_FCTR_RT
	,TVOUTPUT.PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT
	,TVOUTPUT.PROJECT_CD
	,TVOUTPUT.CRTD_CISCO_WRKR_PARTY_KEY
	,TVOUTPUT.LAST_UPD_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY
	,TVOUTPUT.BUILDING_ID
	,TVOUTPUT.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID
	,TVOUTPUT.CAM_PLNNR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY
	,TVOUTPUT.ISO_COUNTRY_CD
	,TVOUTPUT.DCM_PRJ_MGR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY
	,TVOUTPUT.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD
	,TVOUTPUT.EST_END_MTH_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT
	,TVOUTPUT.EST_END_MTH_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT
	,TVOUTPUT.EST_END_QTR_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT
	,TVOUTPUT.EST_END_QTR_FSCL_QTR_NUM_INT
	,TVOUTPUT.EST_START_QTR_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT
	,TVOUTPUT.EST_START_QTR_FSCL_QTR_NUM_INT
	,TVOUTPUT.EST_START_MTH_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT
	,TVOUTPUT.EST_START_MTH_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT
	,TVOUTPUT.FCLTY_MGR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY
	,TVOUTPUT.FRST_CUST_SHP_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT
	,TVOUTPUT.FRST_CUST_SHP_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT
	,TVOUTPUT.FIN_ANLYST_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY
	,TVOUTPUT.GLBL_CAM_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY
	,TVOUTPUT.EST_CMPLTN_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT
	,TVOUTPUT.EST_CMPLTN_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT
	,TVOUTPUT.PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID
	,TVOUTPUT.TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID
	,TVOUTPUT.RL_EST_MGR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY
	,TVOUTPUT.REQUESTOR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY
	,TVOUTPUT.WPR_COST_DEPARTMENT_CD
	,TVOUTPUT.WPR_COST_COMPANY_CD
	,TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT
	,COALESCE (MAX(TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT - INTERVAL '1' DAY)
		OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJ_ID_INT
	       		ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT ASC
			    ROWS BETWEEN 1 FOLLOWING AND 1 FOLLOWING)
		          , DATE '3500-01-01') AS END_TV_DT
	,TVOUTPUT.PROJECT_PARENT 
	,TVOUTPUT.REGION
    ,TVOUTPUT.CRITICALITY_LEVEL
	,TVOUTPUT.CIP_CAP_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT 
    ,TVOUTPUT.CIP_CAP_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT
	,TVOUTPUT.BK_CPTL_FUTURE_ORG_ABBR_NAME
   ,TVOUTPUT.PROJECT_LOCATION_STATE_CD 
    ,TVOUTPUT.PROJECT_LOCATION_CITY_NAME
	,TVOUTPUT.ACTION_CODE
	, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJ_ID_INT
				      ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT ASC) AS RANK_INDEX
	,(CASE WHEN RANK_INDEX = 1 AND TVOUTPUT.BK_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJ_ID_INT IS NOT NULL 
		THEN 'U'
		ELSE 'I' END) AS DML_TYPE       
,'N' as SOURCE_DELETED_FLG		
	FROM 
	(
		SELECT 
			BK_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJ_ID_INT
			,WPR_LEAD_ORGANIZATION_NAME
			,WILDCARD_1_CMT
			,WILDCARD_2_CMT
			,WILDCARD_3_CMT
			,WILDCARD_4_CMT
			,TOTAL_BUDGET_USD_AMT
			,TOTAL_CAPITAL_USD_AMT
			,TOTAL_EXPENSE_USD_AMT
			,TOTAL_PROJECT_USD_AMT
			,TOTAL_SPENT_USD_AMT
			,TOTAL_UNAPPROVED_USD_AMT
			,TOTAL_APPROVED_USD_AMT
			,RESERVED_PROPERTY_FLG
			,REQUESTED_CAPITAL_USD_AMT
			,PROJECT_TYPE_CD
			,PROJECT_REASON_TYPE_CD
			,PROJECT_COST_RANGE_DESCR
			,PROJECT_MANAGER_NAME
			,PROJECT_ACTIVE_STATUS_CD
			,PROJECT_STATUS_CD
			,PROJECT_DURATION_MONTH_CNT
			,PROJECT_DESCR
			,PRIORITY_LEVEL_INT
			,MANUFACTURING_PLANT_CD
			,PERCENT_WORK_COMPLETED_CD
			,OTHER_CONTACT_NAME
			,ORIGINAL_PROJECT_USD_AMT
			,FINANCE_REGION_CD
			,FACILITY_TYPE_CD
			,ELCTRNC_PRJ_APPRVL_FRM_USD_AMT
			,ELCTRNC_PRJ_APPRVL_FRM_NUM
			,DIRECTOR_NAME
			,COST_TYPE_DESCR
			,CONTROLLER_REVIEWER_NAME
			,CONTROLLER_REVIEW_DT
			,CLIENT_REVIEWER_NAME
			,CLIENT_REVIEW_DT
			,CIP_PROJECT_ID
			,CIP_PROJECT_FLG
			,CERTAINTY_LEVEL_INT
			,BDLG_OWNERSHP_STATUS_DESCR
			,ALLOC_SPACE_UNIT_MEASURE_CD
			,PROJECT_SIZE_AREA_AMT
			,PROJ_SIZE_AREA_UNIT_MEASURE_CD
			,ALLOCATED_SPACE_QTY
			,CPTL_FUTURE_PRJ_CREATION_DTM
			,FUTURE_PROJECT_LAST_UPDATE_DTM
			,CPTL_FUTURE_PRJ_APPRVL_DT
			,CPTL_FUTURE_PRJ_APPRVL_FLG
			,CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJECT_CD
			,CPTL_FUTURE_PRJ_BIZ_JSTF_DESCR
			,CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJECT_NAME
			,PROJECT_AREA_TYPE_NAME
			,SPACE_TYPE_CD
			,PRJ_PRIORITY_WEIGHTING_FCTR_RT
			,PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT
			,PROJECT_CD
			,CRTD_CISCO_WRKR_PARTY_KEY
			,LAST_UPD_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY
			,BUILDING_ID
			,BUSINESS_UNIT_ID
			,CAM_PLNNR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY
			,ISO_COUNTRY_CD
			,DCM_PRJ_MGR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY
			,BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD
			,EST_END_MTH_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT
			,EST_END_MTH_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT
			,EST_END_QTR_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT
			,EST_END_QTR_FSCL_QTR_NUM_INT
			,EST_START_QTR_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT
			,EST_START_QTR_FSCL_QTR_NUM_INT
			,EST_START_MTH_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT
			,EST_START_MTH_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT
			,FCLTY_MGR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY
			,FRST_CUST_SHP_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT
			,FRST_CUST_SHP_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT
			,FIN_ANLYST_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY
			,GLBL_CAM_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY
			,EST_CMPLTN_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT
			,EST_CMPLTN_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT
			,PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID
			,TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID
			,RL_EST_MGR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY
			,REQUESTOR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY
			,WPR_COST_DEPARTMENT_CD
			,WPR_COST_COMPANY_CD
			,START_TV_DT
			,CREATE_DATETIME 
			,ACTION_CODE
			,ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY BK_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJ_ID_INT ,FISCAL_QUARTER_START_DATE
					ORDER	BY FISCAL_QUARTER_START_DATE  DESC) AS ROW_NUM
			,CRITICALITY_LEVEL
			,PROJECT_PARENT 
			,REGION
			,CIP_CAP_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT
			,CIP_CAP_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT  
			,BK_CPTL_FUTURE_ORG_ABBR_NAME
			,PROJECT_LOCATION_CITY_NAME
			,PROJECT_LOCATION_STATE_CD 
		FROM
			(
			select 
			SCPI.CAPIT_PROJECT_ID as BK_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJ_ID_INT ,
			SCPI.PROJECT_NAME  as  CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJECT_NAME ,
			COALESCE(SCPI.PROJECT_ACTIVE_STATUS,'UNKNOWN') as   CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJECT_CD , 
			SCPI.BUSINESS_JUSTIFICATION  as CPTL_FUTURE_PRJ_BIZ_JSTF_DESCR  ,
			-999  as  PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT ,
			COALESCE(NFP.BK_PROJECT_CODE,'UNKNOW')  as  PROJECT_CD ,
			COALESCE(SCPI.APPROVAL_FLAG,'=')  as  CPTL_FUTURE_PRJ_APPRVL_FLG ,
			cast(SCPI.APPROVAL_DATE as DATE)  as  CPTL_FUTURE_PRJ_APPRVL_DT,
			SCPI.CREATION_DATE as CPTL_FUTURE_PRJ_CREATION_DTM ,
			SCPI.LAST_UPDATE_DATE  as  FUTURE_PROJECT_LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
			COALESCE(CCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) as  CRTD_CISCO_WRKR_PARTY_KEY  ,
			COALESCE(LUCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) as LAST_UPD_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY  ,
			COALESCE(SCPI.ALLOCATED_SPACE,0)  as ALLOCATED_SPACE_QTY ,
			COALESCE(SCPI.ALLOCATED_SPACE_UOM,'UNK') as ALLOC_SPACE_UNIT_MEASURE_CD,
			COALESCE( SCPI.AREA,0)  as PROJECT_SIZE_AREA_AMT ,
			COALESCE(SCPI.AREA_UOM,'UNK')  as PROJ_SIZE_AREA_UNIT_MEASURE_CD,
			SCPI.BLDG_OWNERSHIP_STATUS  as BDLG_OWNERSHP_STATUS_DESCR ,
			COALESCE(NWRL.BK_BUILDING_ID,'UNKNOWN' ) as BUILDING_ID,
			COALESCE(NBU.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,'UNKNOWN') as BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,
			COALESCE(CPCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) as CAM_PLNNR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY  ,
			SCPI.CERTAINTY_LEVEL as CERTAINTY_LEVEL_INT,
			COALESCE(SCPI.CIP_PROJECT_FLAG,'=') as CIP_PROJECT_FLG,
			SCPI.CIP_PROJECT_ID as CIP_PROJECT_ID,
			cast( SCPI.CLIENT_REVIEW_DATE as DATE)  as CLIENT_REVIEW_DT ,
			SCPI.CLIENT_REVIEWER as CLIENT_REVIEWER_NAME ,
			cast(SCPI.CONTROLLER_REVIEW_DATE as DATE) as CONTROLLER_REVIEW_DT,
			SCPI.CONTROLLER_REVIEWER as CONTROLLER_REVIEWER_NAME,
			SCPI.COST_TYPE as COST_TYPE_DESCR ,
			COALESCE(NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK')   as ISO_COUNTRY_CD , 
			COALESCE(DPMCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) as DCM_PRJ_MGR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY ,
			SCPI.DIRECTOR as DIRECTOR_NAME ,
			COALESCE(SCPI.DV_EPAF_AMOUNT ,0)  as ELCTRNC_PRJ_APPRVL_FRM_USD_AMT ,
			SCPI.EPAF_NUMBER as ELCTRNC_PRJ_APPRVL_FRM_NUM,
			'Fisacl Year' as BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD  ,
			COALESCE(EEMNFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,1900) as EST_END_MTH_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT,
			COALESCE(EEMNFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,99) as EST_END_MTH_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT  ,
			COALESCE(EEQNFQ.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,1900)  as EST_END_QTR_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT ,
			COALESCE(EEQNFQ.BK_FISCAL_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT ,9) as EST_END_QTR_FSCL_QTR_NUM_INT ,
			COALESCE(ESQNFQ.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,1900) as  EST_START_QTR_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT ,
			COALESCE(ESQNFQ.BK_FISCAL_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT ,9) as EST_START_QTR_FSCL_QTR_NUM_INT  , 
			COALESCE(ESMNFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,1900 ) as EST_START_MTH_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT,
			COALESCE(ESMNFM .BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,99) as EST_START_MTH_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT ,
			COALESCE(FMCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY ,-999) as FCLTY_MGR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY  ,
			SCPI.FACILITY_TYPE as FACILITY_TYPE_CD ,
			COALESCE(FCSNFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,1900) as FRST_CUST_SHP_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT ,
			COALESCE(FCSNFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT ,99) as FRST_CUST_SHP_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT  ,
			SCPI.FINANCE_REGION as FINANCE_REGION_CD,
			COALESCE(FACWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY ,-999)  AS FIN_ANLYST_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY ,
			COALESCE(GCCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS GLBL_CAM_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
			COALESCE(SCPI.DV_ORIGINAL_PROJECT_AMOUNT ,0) AS ORIGINAL_PROJECT_USD_AMT,
			SCPI.OTHER_CONTACT AS OTHER_CONTACT_NAME,
			COALESCE(OECNFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,1900) AS EST_CMPLTN_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT  ,
			COALESCE(OECNFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,99) AS EST_CMPLTN_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT ,
			SCPI.PERCENT_WORK_COMPLETED AS PERCENT_WORK_COMPLETED_CD,
			SCPI.PLANT AS MANUFACTURING_PLANT_CD,
			SCPI.PRIORITY_LEVEL AS PRIORITY_LEVEL_INT,
			COALESCE(SCPI.DV_PRODUCT_FAMILY,'UNKNOWN') AS PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
			COALESCE(SCPI.DV_TECH_GROUP,'UNKNOWN') AS TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID,
			COALESCE(SCPI.PROJECT_AREA_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS  PROJECT_AREA_TYPE_NAME, 
			SCPI.PROJECT_DESCRIPTION AS PROJECT_DESCR ,
			SCPI.PROJECT_DURATION AS PROJECT_DURATION_MONTH_CNT ,
			SCPI.PROJECT_LIST_STATUS AS PROJECT_ACTIVE_STATUS_CD, 
			SCPI.PROJECT_MANAGER AS PROJECT_MANAGER_NAME,
			SCPI.PROJECT_RANGE AS PROJECT_COST_RANGE_DESCR ,
			SCPI.PROJECT_REASON_TYPE AS PROJECT_REASON_TYPE_CD,
			SCPI.PROJECT_STATUS AS PROJECT_STATUS_CD,
			SCPI.PROJECT_TYPE AS PROJECT_TYPE_CD,
			COALESCE(RLMNCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999)AS RL_EST_MGR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
			COALESCE(SCPI.DV_REQUESTED_CAPITAL,0)   AS REQUESTED_CAPITAL_USD_AMT,
			COALESCE(REQNCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY ,-999) AS REQUESTOR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
			COALESCE(SCPI.RESERVED_PROPERTY,'=') AS RESERVED_PROPERTY_FLG,
			COALESCE(SCPI.DV_TOTAL_APPROVED_AMOUNT,0)  AS TOTAL_APPROVED_USD_AMT,
			COALESCE(SCPI.DV_TOTAL_BUDGET_AMOUNT ,0) AS TOTAL_BUDGET_USD_AMT,
			COALESCE(SCPI.DV_TOTAL_CAPITAL_AMOUNT ,0) AS TOTAL_CAPITAL_USD_AMT,
			COALESCE(SCPI.DV_TOTAL_EXPENSE_AMOUNT ,0) AS TOTAL_EXPENSE_USD_AMT ,
			COALESCE(SCPI.DV_TOTAL_PROJECT_AMOUNT,0)  AS TOTAL_PROJECT_USD_AMT,
			COALESCE(SCPI.DV_TOTAL_SPENT_AMOUNT ,0)  AS TOTAL_SPENT_USD_AMT ,
			COALESCE(SCPI.DV_TOTAL_UNAPPROVED_AMOUNT ,0) AS TOTAL_UNAPPROVED_USD_AMT,
			SCPI.WILDCARD1 AS WILDCARD_1_CMT,
			SCPI.WILDCARD2 AS WILDCARD_2_CMT,
			SCPI.WILDCARD3 AS WILDCARD_3_CMT,
			SCPI.WILDCARD4 AS WILDCARD_4_CMT,
			COALESCE(NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,'UNKNOW') AS WPR_COST_DEPARTMENT_CD,
			COALESCE(NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE,'UNK') AS WPR_COST_COMPANY_CD,
			SCPI.WPR_LEAD_ORG AS WPR_LEAD_ORGANIZATION_NAME ,
			SCPI.CRITICALITY_LEVEL as PRJ_PRIORITY_WEIGHTING_FCTR_RT,  
			SCPI.SPACE_TYPE as SPACE_TYPE_CD,
		    NFQTV.FISCAL_QUARTER_START_DATE as START_TV_DT,
		    NFQTV.FISCAL_QUARTER_START_DATE   ,
			SCPI.CREATE_DATETIME ,
			SCPI.ACTION_CODE,
			SCPI.CRITICALITY_LEVEL,
			SCPI.PROJECT_PARENT , 
			SCPI.REGION,
			COALESCE(CCNFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,1900) as CIP_CAP_FSCL_YR_NUM_INT,
			COALESCE(CCNFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,99) as CIP_CAP_FSCL_MTH_NUM_INT  ,
			NCFO.BK_CPTL_FUTURE_ORG_ABBR_NAME,
			SCPI.CITY as PROJECT_LOCATION_CITY_NAME,
			SCPI.STATE_PROVINCE as PROJECT_LOCATION_STATE_CD 
		    FROM
			(
			select 
					CAPIT_PROJECT_ID ,
					PROJECT_NAME,
					BUSINESS_JUSTIFICATION,
					COALESCE(SI_PROJECT_ID,'UNKNOW') as DV_SI_PROJECT_ID,
					APPROVAL_FLAG,
					APPROVAL_DATE ,
					CREATION_DATE,
					LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
					CREATED_BY,
					LAST_UPDATED_BY,
					ALLOCATED_SPACE,
					ALLOCATED_SPACE_UOM,
					AREA,
					AREA_UOM,
					BLDG_OWNERSHIP_STATUS,
					COALESCE(BUILDING_ID,'UNKNOWN') as DV_BUILDING_ID,
					COALESCE(BUSINESS_UNIT,'UNKNOWN' ) as DV_BUSINESS_UNIT	,
					CAM_PLANNER,
					CERTAINTY_LEVEL,
					CIP_PROJECT_FLAG,
					CIP_PROJECT_ID,
					CLIENT_REVIEW_DATE,
					CLIENT_REVIEWER,
					CONTROLLER_REVIEW_DATE,
					CONTROLLER_REVIEWER,
					COST_TYPE,
					CASE WHEN trim(COUNTRY)='Dubai' THEN 'United Arab Emirates' 
						 WHEN trim(COUNTRY) = 'EMEA' THEN 'United Kingdom'
						 WHEN trim(COUNTRY) = 'England' THEN 'United Kingdom' 
						 WHEN trim(COUNTRY) = 'Globally' THEN 'UNKNOWN'
						 WHEN trim(COUNTRY) = 'Kazakhhstan' THEN 'Kazakhstan'
						 WHEN trim(COUNTRY) = 'Korea' THEN 'South Korea'
						 WHEN trim(COUNTRY) = 'PHILIPPINES' THEN 'Phillipines'
						 WHEN trim(COUNTRY) = 'RUSSIA' THEN 'Russian Federation'
						 WHEN trim(COUNTRY) = 'Scotland' THEN 'United Kingdom'
						 WHEN  trim( COUNTRY) = 'SERBIA' THEN 'Serbia and Montenegro'
						 WHEN  trim(COUNTRY) ='TRINIDAD & TOBAGO' THEN 'Trinidad and Tobago'
						 WHEN  trim(COUNTRY) = 'UNITED STATES' OR  trim(COUNTRY) ='US' OR  trim(COUNTRY)='USA' 
						            THEN 'United States of America'
						 WHEN  trim(COUNTRY) = 'Uraguay' THEN 'Uruguay'
						 WHEN  trim(COUNTRY) = '' THEN 'UNKNOWN' 
						 when   COUNTRY  IS NULL  then 'UNKNOWN'  END  as DV_COUNTRY,
					DCM_PROJECT_MANAGER,
					DIRECTOR,
					EPAF_AMOUNT * 1000 as DV_EPAF_AMOUNT,
					EPAF_NUMBER,
					ESTIMATED_END_MONTH,
					ESTIMATED_END_QUARTER,
					ESTIMATED_START_QUARTER,
					ESTIMATED_START_MONTH,
					FACILITY_MANAGER,
					FACILITY_TYPE,
					FIRST_CUSTOMER_SHIP_DATE,
					FINANCE_REGION,
					FINANCIAL_ANALYST,
					GLOBAL_CAM,
					ORIGINAL_PROJECT_AMOUNT * 1000 as DV_ORIGINAL_PROJECT_AMOUNT,
					OTHER_CONTACT,
					OTHER_EST_COMP_DATE,
					PERCENT_WORK_COMPLETED,
					PLANT,
					PRIORITY_LEVEL,
					COALESCE(PRODUCT_FAMILY,'UNKNOWN') as DV_PRODUCT_FAMILY,
					TECH_GROUP,
					PROJECT_DESCRIPTION,
					CAST(CASE WHEN PROJECT_DURATION = 'NA' THEN -999  ELSE PROJECT_DURATION END  AS INTEGER)			PROJECT_DURATION,
					PROJECT_ACTIVE_STATUS,
					PROJECT_MANAGER,
					PROJECT_RANGE,
					PROJECT_REASON_TYPE,
					PROJECT_STATUS,
					PROJECT_TYPE,
					PROJECT_AREA_TYPE,
					trim(REALESTATE_MANAGER) as DV_REALESTATE_MANAGER,
					cast (REQUESTED_CAPITAL* cast(1000 as DECIMAL(26,7) )   as decimal(26,7) ) as  DV_REQUESTED_CAPITAL ,
					case when REQUESTOR=' ' then 'UNKNOWN'  end DV_REQUESTOR,
					RESERVED_PROPERTY,
					cast(TOTAL_APPROVED_AMOUNT * 1000  as decimal(26,7) ) as DV_TOTAL_APPROVED_AMOUNT  ,
					TOTAL_BUDGET_AMOUNT * 1000 as DV_TOTAL_BUDGET_AMOUNT  ,
					TOTAL_CAPITAL_AMOUNT * 1000  as DV_TOTAL_CAPITAL_AMOUNT,
					TOTAL_EXPENSE_AMOUNT  * 1000 as DV_TOTAL_EXPENSE_AMOUNT  ,
					TOTAL_PROJECT_AMOUNT  * 1000  as DV_TOTAL_PROJECT_AMOUNT ,
					TOTAL_SPENT_AMOUNT * 1000  as  DV_TOTAL_SPENT_AMOUNT,
					TOTAL_UNAPPROVED_AMOUNT * 1000  as DV_TOTAL_UNAPPROVED_AMOUNT,
					WILDCARD1,
					WILDCARD2,
					WILDCARD3,
					WILDCARD4,
					case when WPR_COST_DEPARTMENT='Unknown' then NULL else WPR_COST_DEPARTMENT end  DV_WPR_COST_DEPARTMENT ,
					REGION,
					WPR_LEAD_ORG,
					SPACE_TYPE,
					PROJECT_LIST_STATUS,
					cast( substr(trim(ESTIMATED_END_MONTH),1,3) as char(3)) as DV_ESTIMATED_END_MONTH_Month,
					cast(substr(trim(ESTIMATED_END_MONTH),5) as integer ) as DV_ESTIMATED_END_MONTH_Year,
					cast( substr(trim(ESTIMATED_START_MONTH),1,3) as char(3) ) as DV_ESTIMATED_START_MONTH_Month,
					cast( substr(trim(ESTIMATED_START_MONTH),5) as integer) as DV_ESTIMATED_START_MONTH_Year,
					cast(substr(trim(FIRST_CUSTOMER_SHIP_DATE),1,3) as char(3) ) as DV_FIRST_CUSTOMER_SHIP_DATE_Mt,
					cast ( substr(trim(FIRST_CUSTOMER_SHIP_DATE),5)  as integer)  as  DV_FIRST_CUSTOMER_SHIP_DATE_Yr,
					cast( substr(trim(OTHER_EST_COMP_DATE),1,3)  as char(3) ) as DV_OTHER_EST_COMP_DATE_Month,
					cast ( substr(trim(OTHER_EST_COMP_DATE),5) as integer) as DV_OTHER_EST_COMP_DATE_Year,
					COALESCE(substr(trim(DV_WPR_COST_DEPARTMENT),1,3),'UNK') as DV_WPR_COST_DEPARTMENT_Comp,
					COALESCE(substr(trim(DV_WPR_COST_DEPARTMENT),4,6),'UNKNOW') as DV_WPR_COST_DEPARTMENT_Dept,
					COALESCE(TECH_GROUP,'UNKNOWN') as DV_TECH_GROUP,
					CRITICALITY_LEVEL,
					QUARTER_ID,
					CREATE_DATETIME,
					ACTION_CODE,
					PROJECT_PARENT ,     
					CIP_CAPITALIZATION_DATE, 
					cast( substr(trim(CIP_CAPITALIZATION_DATE),1,3) as char(3)) as DV_CAPIT_START_MONTH_Month, 
					cast(substr(trim(CIP_CAPITALIZATION_DATE),5) as integer ) as DV_CAPIT_START_MONTH_Year,
				    ORG_ID ,
				    CITY,
				    STATE_PROVINCE
			FROM  
			$$STGDB.ST_CAP_PROJECT_INFO_ARC
		) SCPI 
			INNER JOIN (select BK_PROJECT_CODE from  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_PROJECT_TV group by BK_PROJECT_CODE) NFP
				on SCPI.DV_SI_PROJECT_ID = NFP.BK_PROJECT_CODE 
			INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CAPITAL_FUTURE_ORG  NCFO 
				ON SCPI.ORG_ID = NCFO.SK_ORG_ID
			LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY CCWP
				ON SCPI.created_by = CCWP.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS
			LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY LUCWP
				ON SCPI.LAST_UPDATED_BY = LUCWP.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS 
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_WORKPLACE_RESOURCE_LOCATION  NWRL
				on SCPI.DV_BUILDING_ID=NWRL.BK_BUILDING_ID 
			/* INNER  JOIN   (select  BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID from $$COMREFVWDB.N_BUSINESS_UNIT_TV group by 1 )NBU
				on SCPI.DV_BUSINESS_UNIT = NBU.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID */  /* CHANGING TO LEFT OUTER JOIN AS PER REQUIREMENT */
			LEFT OUTER JOIN   (select  BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID from $$COMREFVWDB.N_BUSINESS_UNIT_TV group by 1 )NBU
				on SCPI.DV_BUSINESS_UNIT = NBU.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID
			LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY CPCWP
				ON  SCPI.CAM_PLANNER= CPCWP.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS
			LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC
				ON trim(SCPI.DV_COUNTRY)= trim(NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME)
			LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY  DPMCWP
				ON SCPI. DCM_PROJECT_MANAGER=DPMCWP.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS 
			LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH  EEMNFM
				ON 	DV_ESTIMATED_END_MONTH_Month  =  substr(EEMNFM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,1,3) 
			    and DV_ESTIMATED_END_MONTH_Year  =  cast( substr(EEMNFM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME, CHARACTER_LENGTH(EEMNFM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME)-1,2) as integer) 
			LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH CCNFM
				ON DV_CAPIT_START_MONTH_Month  = substr(CCNFM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,1,3) 
					and DV_CAPIT_START_MONTH_Year  =  cast( substr(CCNFM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME, CHARACTER_LENGTH (CCNFM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME)-1,2)  as integer) 
			LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_QUARTER EEQNFQ
				ON SCPI. ESTIMATED_END_QUARTER=EEQNFQ. DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
			LEFT OUTER   JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_QUARTER ESQNFQ
				ON SCPI. ESTIMATED_START_QUARTER=ESQNFQ. DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
			LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH ESMNFM
				ON DV_ESTIMATED_START_MONTH_Month  = substr(ESMNFM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,1,3) 
					and DV_ESTIMATED_START_MONTH_Year  =  cast( substr(ESMNFM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME, CHARACTER_LENGTH(ESMNFM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME)-1,2)  as integer)
			LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY FMCWP
				ON  SCPI.FACILITY_MANAGER= FMCWP.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS
			LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH FCSNFM
				ON  DV_FIRST_CUSTOMER_SHIP_DATE_Mt  =  substr(FCSNFM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,1,3)  
					and DV_FIRST_CUSTOMER_SHIP_DATE_Yr  =  cast( substr(FCSNFM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME, CHARACTER_LENGTH(FCSNFM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME)-1,2)  as integer)
			LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH OECNFM
				ON cast( substr(OECNFM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,1,3) as CHAR(3) )  = DV_OTHER_EST_COMP_DATE_Month
				AND cast( substr(OECNFM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME, CHARACTER_LENGTH(OECNFM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NAME)-1,2) as integer)  = DV_OTHER_EST_COMP_DATE_Year
			/*INNER JOIN (SELECT BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID from   $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_FAMILY_TV GROUP BY 1)  NPF
				ON NPF.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID = SCPI.DV_PRODUCT_FAMILY  */
			INNER  JOIN (SELECT BK_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID from  $$COMREFVWDB.N_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_TV group by 1)  NTG 
				ON NTG.BK_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID = DV_TECH_GROUP  
			LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY RLMNCWP
				ON trim(SCPI.DV_REALESTATE_MANAGER) = RLMNCWP.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS
			LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY REQNCWP
				ON SCPI.DV_REQUESTOR = REQNCWP.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS 
			LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY FACWP
				ON SCPI.FINANCIAL_ANALYST = FACWP.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS
			LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY GCCWP
				ON SCPI.GLOBAL_CAM = GCCWP.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS
			INNER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT NFD
				ON DV_WPR_COST_DEPARTMENT_Comp = NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE
				AND DV_WPR_COST_DEPARTMENT_Dept = NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE  
			INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_QUARTER  NFQTV  
				ON SCPI. QUARTER_ID=NFQTV. DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
			WHERE SCPI.DV_PRODUCT_FAMILY IN (SELECT BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID from   $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_FAMILY_TV GROUP BY 1)
			
		)TVINPUT
		QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TVINPUT.BK_CAPITAL_FUTURE_PROJ_ID_INT ,TVINPUT.START_TV_DT
										ORDER BY TVINPUT.FISCAL_QUARTER_START_DATE DESC) =1
	)TVOUTPUT	
	WHERE TVOUTPUT.ROW_NUM = 1
AND 1=2
